original_image_tags: A page of handwritten text on aged, off-white paper. The writing is in purple ink, with a cursive, somewhat slanted style. The top right corner has a handwritten number "2". There are two dark, circular punch holes at the top margin, one partially obscured by a black dot. A small, dark smudge or blotch is present near the top center.

elements.description: A page consisting entirely of cursive handwritten text in purple ink on a light background, with no photographs, sketches, diagrams, maps, or charts present. Two dark circular punch holes are visible at the top right edge.
